creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 221135
Patch to upgrade v_sim to 3.8.0.

The attached patch upgrades v_sim to the latest 3.8.0.

Changelog is available at <https://gitlab.com/l_sim/v_sim/-/blob/staging/ChangeLog.en>.

Note 1: it now depends on OpenBabel 3, this is why I do not commit it right now.

Note 2: it also depends on science/abinit, which is broken ATM. See PR 252221 to fix it (with PR 252162 for science/wannier90).
